title: Firmographic Enrichment Actor
description: Enriches company firmographic data from a website URL. Extracts employee range, revenue, funding stage, founding year, investors, and company status from live SERP data — no hallucination.

websiteUrl.title: Company Website URL
websiteUrl.description: The company website URL to enrich (e.g. https://stripe.com).

serpApiKey.title: SerpApi Key
serpApiKey.description: Your SerpApi API key. Get one free at serpapi.com. Can also be set via SERP_API_KEY env var.

groqApiKey.title: Groq API Key
groqApiKey.description: Your Groq API key for LLM extraction. Get one free at console.groq.com. Can also be set via GROQ_API_KEY env var.

groqModel.title: Groq Model
groqModel.description: Groq model to use. llama-3.3-70b-versatile gives the best extraction accuracy. llama-3.1-8b-instant is faster but less accurate.

maxConcurrency.title: Max Concurrent Requests
maxConcurrency.description: Max URLs processed simultaneously. Keep at 2–3 to avoid SerpApi rate limits.

delayBetweenRequestsMs.title: Delay Between Requests (ms)
delayBetweenRequestsMs.description: Milliseconds to wait between SERP API calls. Increase if hitting rate limits.

outputFormat.title: Output Format
outputFormat.description: Dataset output is always available. 'both' also saves a downloadable CSV to the key-value store.
